Aydan Comba – Aydan Comba is a dedicated climate activist and youth leader who has taken on key roles in global institutions such as the United Nations Environment Programme and the European Union. She is also a TEDx speaker, known for her work as an entrepreneur and climate advocate. She is the founding president of IDD ORG, a dynamic international organization bringing together over 500 members from 56 countries, working collectively for environmental justice and sustainability. Her leadership and impact in science and innovation have been recognized by the New York Academy of Sciences, where she was selected as one of the world’s leading young STEM leaders. Aydan also proudly represented Turkey as one of the 30 most impactful young leaders chosen by the Global Youth Movement, highlighting her role in shaping a more sustainable and equitable future.
